summary: Frontend-only Phase 4 (WebAuthn) regression + new-feature testing of Ko|Do · Vault. All 9 scenarios PASSED (9/9 = 100%). Phase 1+2+3 regression intact (setup → unlock → lock → wrong/correct login → reload → destroy). Phase 4 fallback in headless Chromium correct (biometric.supported=false → no biometric-enable-prompt on dashboard, no biometric-login-btn on login). 6-PhaseBadge dashboard structure verified (F1-4 done emerald, F5-6 pending). 14-day rule verified by simulating lastMasterAt=15 days ago + mock biometric blob → master-required-banner shown, biometric-login-btn hidden. 5-min-fresh verified (lastMasterAt set within 1s of unlock). Destroy cleanup verified (kodo-vault.blob.v1, kodo-vault.biometric.v1, kodo-vault.lastMasterAt.v1 all null). Console clean — only HMR/WebSocket noise (filtered as expected per spec).
critical_code_review_comments: useVault.unlockWithBiometric() comment says 'IKKE refresh markMasterUsedNow' which is correct per 14d-rule semantics — but worth noting that masterFresh is recomputed on every refreshBiometric() call. Logic is consistent.

biometric-store.ts clearBiometric() also clears BIO_DISMISSED_KEY but NOT LAST_MASTER_KEY. destroyVault() in useVault.ts handles LAST_MASTER_KEY separately via clearLastMasterAt(). Consistent design — clearBiometric is for 'fjern Touch ID' (keeps lastMaster for future re-enable), destroyVault wipes everything.
Same minor issues from iteration_1 still apply: HMR WebSocket 502 noise (cosmetic), MasterPasswordSetup useEffect-vs-onChange for clearing errors (low priority refactor).
test_credentials: Test password used: TestVaultPass123! (16 chars). No backend creds (zero-knowledge, client-side only).
seed_data_creation: Mocked biometric blob {credentialId:'AAAA', prfSalt:'BBBB', iv:'CCCC', cipher:'DDDD', registeredAt:'2026-01-01T00:00:00.000Z'} placed in localStorage to simulate registered state for 14d-rule test. Cleaned up via destroy at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 verified end-to-end via Playwright. Headless Chromium has NO platform authenticator → biometric.supported=false confirmed. Useful localStorage keys: kodo-vault.blob.v1 (encrypted vault), kodo-vault.biometric.v1 (BiometricBlob), kodo-vault.lastMasterAt.v1 (ISO timestamp), kodo-vault.biometric.dismissed.v1 ('true' string). New data-testids added in Phase 4: biometric-enable-prompt, biometric-enable-form, biometric-enable-cta, biometric-dismiss-btn, biometric-confirm-pwd-input, biometric-enable-error, biometric-enable-submit, biometric-login-btn, biometric-login-error, biometric-active-row, biometric-remove-btn, master-required-banner. The 14d-rule simulation requires setting BOTH kodo-vault.lastMasterAt.v1 (to old date) AND kodo-vault.biometric.v1 (so registered=true) — otherwise masterRequired flag in MasterPasswordLogin is false. Actual WebAuthn registration/PRF/wrap flow CANNOT be tested in headless — needs real device with Touch ID/Face ID/Windows Hello + PRF-supporting browser (Chrome/Edge 116+, Safari 17+).
